name: Legendary Hunter
description: Legendary Hunter is a legendary class mod for Zer0, made by Jakobs. It can drop from most appropriate loot sources, with better odds from Vermivorous the Invincible, Pete the Invincible, Voracidous the Invincible, and the Ancient Dragons of Destruction.
notes:
A SHiFT code that awards a Legendary Hunter to one character is included with the Diamond Plate Loot Chest.

Item card caption: "Precision. Deadliness. Cool face masks."

The red flavour text references a Mordecai line when he is downed in Borderlands.

special.description:
At max level it boosts cooldown rate by 51%, critical hit damage by 41.8%, and reload speed by 36.8%.

Unique effect: activating Decepti0n restores 10% of max health.

Known issue: the item card can show an incorrect reload speed value.
special.title: "I never die."

abilities: Using Deception instantly restores 10% of your Max Health.
